What has to happen before 100% covered

  • Every route must be at least audited. Census currently shows 1 of 53 routes as NOT YET.
  • All remaining truth/workflow candidates must be repaired, merged, or consciously waived with docs updated.
  • All UI/token candidates must be resolved or explicitly accepted as design debt.
  • Hidden routes cannot stay a blind spot.
  • The census, truth audit, and decisions log must be refreshed after each major packet lane closes.
Current system state: 96% fully packetized route coverage. 54 truth packets merged, 0 remaining. 1 UI packets queued.
